title: Crazy progression — show, don't narrate
principle: Stop telling viewers what they will watch and start showing them. Compress time aggressively so the story keeps escalating instead of dwelling on any one beat.
rule: In minutes 1-3, transition from setup to payoff fast: cover multiple days/events rapidly rather than spending three minutes on day one. Every cut should advance the stakes.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
source.quote: stop telling people what they will be watching and start showing them
